steps.title: Look for a shared feature
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a similarity between The Three Passions and Désirée. The shared fact in the notes is that both films include Mara Oberon.

steps.title: Reject contrasts and single-film focus
steps.content: Choice B contrasts early and later points in Oberon's career. Choice C contrasts an uncredited role with a credited one. Choice D discusses only The Three Passions. The sentence that names both films and says both include Oberon emphasizes the similarity. The answer is A.
